overall.description: First-person perspective from inside a truck cabin driving through a heavy snowstorm at night on a mountain highway. The windshield wipers work continuously to clear the snow as the vehicle passes through a snow shed and navigates winding roads. This is game engine footage from a truck simulator.

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along an open mountain highway during a heavy nighttime snowstorm. Snow banks flank both sides of the road while evergreen forests line the distant hills. Windshield wipers sweep continuously as the vehicle approaches a snow shed structure visible in the distance, with occasional vehicles visible ahead on the snowy road.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow shed avalanche gallery over highway

events.description: truck enters covered snow shed structure protecting the road from avalanches
truck exits the snow shed back into open snowy landscape

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed while passing through the enclosed snow shed structure

entered.detail: concrete and metal roof structure covering the highway to prevent snow accumulation
solid concrete walls of the snow shed with vertical support beams
solid concrete walls of the snow shed with vertical support beams

segments.scene_description: The truck enters a semi-covered snow shed structure that shelters the highway from avalanches. Concrete walls and a roof enclose the road, blocking the falling snow and sky from view. The artificial headlights illuminate the concrete interior as the vehicle passes through the short covered section before emerging back into the open.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding snowy mountain highway with curves

events.description: truck navigates a sharp left curve on the snowy highway
passing an oncoming truck on the two-lane snowy road

agents.ego_description: navigating winding curves and managing speed on slippery snow-covered road

notable_agents.action: oncoming truck approaching from the opposite direction with headlights visible

entered.detail: snow banks reappearing along the left side of the road after the tunnel
snow banks reappearing along the right side of the road after the tunnel
snow-covered pine trees visible again on the left hillside
snow-covered pine trees visible again on the right hillside

segments.scene_description: Back in the open snowy landscape, the truck continues along the winding mountain highway. The road curves through the forested terrain with high snow banks on both sides. The driver navigates sharp turns while occasionally encountering oncoming traffic, with headlights cutting through the heavy falling snow and darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates a treacherous mountain highway, transitioning from an open snowstorm into a sheltered tunnel and back into the wintry night. It begins on an open road flanked by deep snow banks and distant evergreen forests, with windshield wipers sweeping continuously against a heavy snowfall. As the vehicle advances, the scene shifts abruptly as the truck enters a semi-covered concrete snow shed, replacing the open sky with artificial headlights illuminating enclosed walls. The camera then emerges from the structure back into the freezing darkness, where the road begins to wind sharply through the forested terrain. Finally, the truck navigates these tight curves through the heavy snow, with headlights cutting through the gloom to reveal occasional oncoming traffic.
